games.name: Carrot Climber
games.description: Carrot Climber is a cute and fun game where a hungry rabbit climbs walls to collect carrots! Each level has hooks placed on the wall, and you need to help the rabbit jump from one hook to another. Aim carefully&amp;mdash;if you miss, the rabbit will fall! Collect carrots and coins along the way to unlock the next level. It&amp;rsquo;s a sweet mix of challenge and fun for all ages.
games.instructions: Desktop Mouse Click Drag to Aim Release to Jump Mobile Touch Drag to Aim Release Finger to Jump

games.name: Aim
games.description: AIM is a term that began to be used during the development of 3d shooters and competitive matches. It was the name of the statistics of hits on target and reaction speed. In this project, you need to use a rebound to set multiple goals at a level. The game features: Advanced object flight physics Good graphics Addictive gameplay Are you ready to upgrade your reaction speed and accuracy? Then start playing! Good luck!
games.instructions: When you start the game and select a level you will be greeted by objects on the map there can be from one to ten of them You need to set them in one shot You can fire a shot from anywhere on the level the main thing is to hit all the objects on the

games.name: Malatang Master Stack Run 3D
games.description: Ready to feel the hottest and most fun parkour game ever? In Malatang Master Stack Run 3D, you become a street food chef. Keep running through colorful 3D platform tracks and collecting tasty ingredients to build the tallest skewer stack ever. Slide to collect noodles, Chicken thighs, chili, and more as you dash forward.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Anime Doll   DIY Cosplay Girl
games.description: Anime Doll - DIY Cosplay Girl is a fashion and lovely dress-up game that presents unprecedented shocking visual effects, providing girls with an amazing dress-up experience! With its stunning graphics and easy-to-use interface, this game is perfect for anyone who loves fashion and adventure.
games.instructions: Players simply need to select their preferred clothing items hairstyles and accessories from the games extensive wardrobe selection and apply them to their princess character using the touch and drag controls

games.name: LOL Dolls Nail Salon
games.description: Welcome to LOL Dolls Nail Salon, a casual fashion design game for girl players. If you are a doll lover or like doing nail designs, then this game is the perfect place for you. In the game, you are totally on your own to design the fashion nail for your dolls. Dive into the magic fashion nail salon and dazzle the crowd with your charming nail design! You need to start with skin and nail care.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Pokemon Memory Time
games.description: A Fun Memory Game With Pokemon Magic. Pokemon Memory Time is not just a memory game &amp;mdash; it is a brain-boosting adventure filled with your favorite pocket monsters! Flip colorful cards, uncover hidden Pokemon, and test how well your memory really works. Each round is a playful puzzle that sharpens your mind and warms your heart. Flip Fast and Remember Right!
games.instructions: Mouse to play

games.name: Sandbox Squid Game   Create a Challenge
games.description: Sandbox Squid Game - Create a Challenge &amp;mdash; a game inspired by Squid Game. The game genre is a sandbox. Therefore, you can freely build whatever you want. The main task is to build a test that players will pass. You can help them, hinder them, or even kill them. When players pass the test, you get money. The game has: more than 5 maps, 4 blocks for construction, more than 5 players, 4 skins for the guard.
games.instructions: larr rarr or AD - Right Left uarr or W - Jump Q - Change block S - Place block F - Shoot with machine gun After you build the test dont forget to click on the green button in the upper left corner

games.name: Steal Labubu   Sprunki!
games.description: Steal Labubu - Sprunki! &amp;ndash; a platformer with physics. You play as Sprunki Pinky. Your task is to carry the found Labubu toy to the green zone. There are 24 levels in the game.
games.instructions: Take the toy and bring it to the green field WAD or larr rarr uarr - Movement X or S or darr - Take Throw the toy The game has a double jump

games.name: Night Racing
games.description: Get ready for thrilling nighttime races in an adrenaline-filled city! In this game, youll become a true street racer. Jump into the seat of a powerful sports car and hit the streets of the nocturnal city where exciting challenges await you. Complete various missions and perform tricks to showcase your driving skills, evading the police and leaving them far behind. As the game progresses, youll have the opportunity to purchase new, more powerful and faster cars. Become the king of street racing!
games.instructions: W - accelerate S - brake reverse A - steer left D - steer right Space - handbrake F - nitro available from the 3rd car M - enlarge map L K - control lights I - start stop the engine C - switch camera Mouse - camera rotation ESC TAB - menu

games.name: Pixel Slide Puzzle
games.description: This is a pixel slide puzzle where you build scenes similar to the classic 15-puzzle &amp;mdash; but with one major twist: every piece can go in any position. Inside, youll find nearly 70 unique levels, each representing a handcrafted pixel illustration. Use the hint feature to preview the completed scene and figure out the correct layout. Perfect for fans of pixel art and relaxing puzzles!
games.instructions: Drag and drop pieces to complete the image You can place any piece in any slot Use the hint button to see what the finished level should look like

games.name: ASMR Games Pretty Princess
games.description: Welcome to ASMR Games Pretty Princess, a casual ASMR makeup game for girls. If you are a fan of makeup or dress-up, or love playing princess games, then this is the perfect place for you. Meet various girls and a specific story in the game. Use your wisdom to help the girl get rid of her appearance anxiety. Do skin cleaning, apply cosmetics, add accessories, select beautiful suits...
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: PFW The Big Shoulder Couture
games.description: Welcome to PFW-The Big Shoulder Couture. Celebrity girls are getting ready for another action. Yes! it&amp;rsquo;s Paris Fashion Week! They are excited to try big Shoulder Couture outfits. Browse their wardrobe and pick suitable outfits and accessories. Don&amp;rsquo;t forget to give unique hairstyles. Join them as fashion expert and help the girls to show their stunning fashion looks!
games.instructions: Left Mouse Button Click

games.name: Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up
games.description: In Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up, you&amp;rsquo;re dressing up your doll and getting her ready to go live. Pick from different styles&amp;mdash;she can look like a fairy, wear chill street clothes, or go for a beach outfit. When you&amp;rsquo;re done, she jumps on the stream and starts showing off her look. You can mess with her hair, add makeup, and try out accessories. There&amp;rsquo;s also a battle mode where you go up against other players to see who styled it best.
games.instructions: Dress Up Tap or click to pick outfits and mix styles Go Live Send your doll on stage and watch her perform Battle Enter fashion contests and vote on looks No rush no limits mdash just show off your creativity and style sense

games.name: Stellar Cathcer
games.description: Catch the Falling Stars A fast-paced game where you catch falling stars and survive as long as possible. Avoid misses, collect power-ups, and progress through harder levels. Features: Catch stars for points Golden Stars = double points Time Slower slows items Hearts recover misses Bolts boost your speed Shop to unlock skins 5 levels: Easy to Endless Play with keyboard or touch
games.instructions: Keyboard Move Left A or larr Move Right D or rarr Touch Mobile Tap left right side of the screen to move

games.name: Skulls And Bombs
games.description: Welcome to Skulls And Bombs &amp;mdash; a pirate arcade game where speed means treasure and one mistake leads to an explosion! Click on various items to earn points, but beware of skulls and bombs &amp;mdash; one wrong click and you&amp;rsquo;re sunk! The game gets faster over time, and so do your chances of getting rich&amp;hellip; or not? Test your reflexes and become the fastest pirate on the seas! The golden rule: never click on skulls or bombs. These dangerous objects are thrown in along with the others and can easily trick you. One wrong tap ends the game instantly. So you&amp;rsquo;ll need more than just quick fingers &amp;mdash; you&amp;rsquo;ll need sharp focus. This makes the game not only fast-paced
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Match Memory Online
games.description: Looking for an online version of classic Card Matching games? Play a refreshed version of this beloved game here! Win to earn coins and use coins for powerups. Powerups will help you for online matching duels, where you must go against an opponent to match as many cards as possible in one board. As you progress online youll get trophies to advance to new and better leagues, awarding more coins and harder opponents. If youre more of a casual player, you can still play a regular level mode, where you have to find pairs of cards in a bigger and bigger board with a set of lives to do it.You lose a life not finding a pair. Are you ready?Play now
games.instructions: Tap a card to reveal Tap 2 cards of same image to get a match Use powerups to win easier

games.name: SnakeGamePro
games.description: elive the retro arcade thrill with a modern twist! Classic Snake Pro brings back the iconic arcade experience with sleek visuals, smooth controls, and addictive gameplay. Features: Modern Retro Design &amp;ndash; Vibrant colors, smooth animations, and a clean grid layout. Intuitive Controls &amp;ndash; Play with keyboard (arrow keys) or touchscreen (swipe gestures). Speed Boost &amp;ndash; Game gets faster as you score, testing your reflexes! High Score System &amp;ndash; Compete against yourself and unlock new records. Pause &amp;amp; Resume &amp;ndash; Take a break anytime and ju
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Snakes Eating Blocks
games.description: Snake Game is a fun and addictive HTML5 arcade game where you control a green snake using the arrow keys. Eat the red food to grow longer, avoid running into yourself, and try to beat your high score! Designed with responsive controls, smooth animations, and mobile swipe support, this game is perfect for quick and challenging gameplay anytime, anywhere.
games.instructions: Use Arrow Keys to move up down right left

games.name: Death Worm 2
games.description: The Death Worm has surfaced. In Death Worm, you control a colossal underground monster, bursting through the earth to wreak havoc in a thrilling mix of arcade, action, and casual destruction. There are different modes for you to choose from. For example, enter level mode. Swimming underground at high speeds, locking onto prey and breaking through the ground to complete the fatal attack. Eliminate humans, helicopters, cars, etc.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: TickTock Challenge
games.description: Looking for the craziest brain teaser ever? Welcome to TickTock Challenge! This is a superb collection of minigames! From fun bubble shooter action to relaxing 2048 puzzles, from clever match and merge challenges to salon-themed brain teasers. This game has it all! Every level brings a new surprise, pushing you to think faster and smarter under the pressure of the ticking clock! Each round is quick, crazy, and incredibly fun.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang
games.description: Step into the world of ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang, where you take on the role of an adorable mukbang streamer! Get ready to indulge in delicious food, satisfy your cravings, and share the experience with your viewers in a cozy, interactive livestream. The more you eat and engage, the more you earn!
games.instructions: Shop Cook and Enjoy Delicious Foods Live Stream Your Mukbang Adventures Earn Money Upgrade Your Girl and Buy More Food

games.name: Mahjong Master Challenge
games.description: Ready to flip tiles, race the clock and sharpen your mind? MahjongMasterChallenge packs many handcrafted mahjong layouts into one fun puzzle journey. Your goal: clear the board by matching identical or coherent tiles. For example, chow: Combine two pairs into a sequence to clear. Kong: Combine two pairs into four of a kind to clear. Use your logic skills to eliminate and keep upgrading.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Ellies Recipe: Dubai Chocolate Bar
games.description: Whip up luxury in Ellie&amp;rsquo;s Recipe: Dubai Chocolate Bar! Help Ellie create rich, decadent chocolate treats in this fun, interactive cooking game. Gather ingredients, prepare molds, make gourmet fillings, and craft elegant chocolate bars with Dubai flair. Unlock stylish outfits for Ellie and enjoy hands-on cooking fun with real kitchen actions. From mixing to decorating, every step is sweet! Play now and become a luxury dessert pro with Ellie!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Sprunky Rich Rich Rich
games.description: The Sprunky brothers fall into rivalry and start a competition. Both Sprunky brothers are very ambitious and want to win against each other. In this two-player game, the one who collects and deposits the most money into the piggy bank wins. Collect all the money before your brother and win the game. Be careful &amp;mdash; dangerous objects are coming from everywhere. Dont hit them or youll lose the game!
games.instructions: Use WASD keys and Arrow Keys to move bull The first player to collect 50 coins wins the game bull Be careful while collecting money Sharp blades come from the sides and above

games.name: My Baby Unicorn Pony Care 2
games.description: Welcome to My Baby Unicorn - Pony Care, a casual baby pet care game for girl players. You will witness the birth of the baby unicorn, take care of him, and play with him! If you are a pet lover, do not miss this pet care simulation game. Have endless fun seeing the little unicorn growing up! Click on the different icons to feed the baby with food, soothe him to sleep, and try perfect dress-up. Earn extra stars and energies after you finish each care task.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Super Meat Boy Online
games.description: Super Meat Boy Online is a tough as nails platformer where you play as an animated cube of meat whos trying to save his girlfriend (who happens to be made of bandages) from an evil fetus in a jar wearing a tux. Our meaty hero will leap from walls, over seas of buzz saws, through crumbling caves and pools of old needles.
games.instructions: Use the mouse or touch to play

games.name: Crazy Bouncer
games.description: Bounce your way to victory! Take control of a bouncy ball in this fun and challenging platformer. Jump, roll, and dodge through tricky obstacles, deadly traps, and moving platforms as you aim to reach the green flag at the end of each level. Master the timing of your jumps by charging and releasing to gain extra height. Precision and patience are the key&amp;mdash;can you make it through all levels without falling? With colorful graphics, satisfying controls, and physics-based gameplay, this game is perfect for fans of casual and skill-based games. Reach the green flag, avoid the red zones, and prove your bouncing skills!
games.instructions: Controls Arrow Keys or A D ndash Move Left Right Spacebar ndash Hold to charge jump release to jump Touch Controls Mobile Tap left side to move Tap and hold right side to charge jump release to jump Timing and precision are key Hold your jump

games.name: Animal cards memory
games.description: Animal Cards Memory is a game that helps you train your memory. No matter how old you are, these types of games are useful at any age. The game consists of 7 levels that become more difficult as you go ahead. Animal memory card games are more than just a source of entertainment; they are a dynamic educational resource that adapts to modern lifestyles. By combining accessibility, variety, and interactive learning, these games not only engage children but also lay the groundwork for essential cognitive and social skills that will benefit them in the long run.
games.instructions: Mouse for the computer devices and finger for touch devices

games.name: Gem Dojo
games.description: Gem Dojo Match gems. Master skills. Become the ultimate puzzle ninja. Welcome to Gem Dojo, where stealth meets strategy in a vibrant match-3 puzzle adventure set in the world of ninjas! Train in the ancient art of gem-matching to unleash powerful combos, defeat rival ninjas, and rise through the ranks of the secret dojo. Swap and match colorful gems to charge up your ninja abilities, unlock hidden techniques, and outsmart increasingly tricky puzzle challenges. Only the sharpest minds and fastest fingers can become true masters of the Gem Dojo.
games.instructions: Match-3 and win bonuses

games.name: Squishmallow Coloring Book
games.description: Get ready to color your favorite Squishmallow! Weve got over 16 adorable Squishmallow pictures just waiting for your creative touch.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Screw Sort Puzzle Pin Jam 3D
games.description: Want a fun 3D puzzle that&amp;rsquo;s strangely relaxing? In ScrewSortPuzzle:PinJam3D, you&amp;rsquo;ll remove every screw, sort colorful pins, and match them to the right slots without causing a jam! You will have to keep matching the screws of the right color and put them in the box of the corresponding color. Rotate the board to spot the screws you can safely loosen first. You can experience remove screw mode.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Animal Racing 2
games.description: Face the wildest race of your life in Animal Racing. It&amp;rsquo;s a full-blown arcade adventure filled with running, transforming, and brain-tickling puzzles! Youll be running on platforms with your opponents. Outsmart your opponents in epic simulator-style racing challenges. Quick response to transform into different animals on different platforms. For example, transforming a shark to cross the sea, an eagle to fly over a gap, an orangutan to run up a flight of steps.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Fun Mini Games For Princess
games.description: Welcome to Fun Mini Games For Princess, a collection of mini casual games for kids. Dive into the gaming world and enjoy the fun of playing at your fingertips! Whether you are a casual gamer who looks for relaxation or a skillful player with a purpose, you will find your favorite game and enjoy endless fun in our mini games. Our mini games cover a large range of categories.

games.name: Moe Kittens Cat Avatar Maker
games.description: Have you got the idea of raising a pet? Do you like playing with lovely cats? Welcome to Moe Kittens: Cat Avatar Maker, a cat avatar simulator game online. You can create your own kitten in every detail, from colors, shapes, tails, to patterns. Various colors and patterns for you to choose from. Never stop creating new fashion! Easy control allows players of all skill levels to enjoy.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Skibidi Toilet Melon Sandbox
games.description: Welcome to Skibidi Toilet Melon Sandbox, where youll embark on a journey in epic battlefield with brave warrior. These Casual Merge Games bring exquisite model and scene, immersing battle master in the strategic challenges between monsters and warriors. In Monster Battle toilet games, take on the role of a strategic Battle Master, defeating toilet warriors by synthesizing fight monster! Toilet games emphasize thinking, make key decisions that affect victory or defeat!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Candy Monster Raffi
games.description: Help the candy monster Raffi eat all the candies! He absolutely loves them &amp;ndash; all he wants is to eat candy. But be careful while collecting them! If you jump in the wrong direction, you might hit dangerous spikes. This cute little monster is hungry &amp;ndash; run and feed Raffi with as many candies as you can!
games.instructions: Click on the candy just in time to eat the candies watch out for obstacles collect coins buy other costumes The game is available to play on both mobile devices and desktop computers

games.name: Stupid Arrow
games.description: Blunt Arrow is a one&amp;ndash;of-a-kind action game that can train your reflexes to perfection. Try to walk to the end of the rapidly narrowing circle. The arrow cannot penetrate several objects, you will have to make a lot of accurate shots, and then reach the end. The game offers: Unique gameplay Good graphics Development of reaction and precision Hurry up and start playing, beat your friends high score and collect the rewards!
games.instructions: You start the game in the center of the circle your task is to get out of the circle by shooting accurately at the platforms the circle is constantly narrowing Can you get out of it

games.name: Fruit Merge: Juicy Drop Game
games.description: Dive deep into the vibrant and enthralling world of fruit-matching with our exciting game, Fruit Merge: Juicy Drop Game! When the same fruits collide, they merge into a larger fruit. Your mission is to smartly pair the same types of fruits to make the biggest possible fruits without letting them overflow from the container. However, as the fruits grow in size, space becomes a premium - managing it effectively is your key challenge. Can you strategize and solve this fruity puzzle?
games.instructions: Challenge yourself and create a giant fruit Start by merging two smaller fruits to eventually form a gigantic one It rsquo s a feat only 1 of players have achieved Are you ready to join that elite group

games.name: HoppyRushy
games.description: The character moves back and forth on the platform, controlling the characters upward jump to the safe platform. Coins are awarded during the game, and coins can unlock other characters. Lets see how many platforms you can skip.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Labubu Zombie Miner
games.description: Labubu got lost in the mine while searching for gold and valuable minerals. The mines owner, a zombie miner, is chasing Labubu. Labubu must escape safely. Help him escape and reach the parchment at the end of the mine. The parchment is very important &amp;mdash; it contains the way out of the mine. Reach the parchment safely!
games.instructions: Press W the key to jump Playable on both mobile and PC Double jump available

games.name: Martial Artist
games.description: This time, you are a martial artist, and you will experience the combination of killing and strategy. See how far you can last! Simple click controls and pixel graphics make this game perfect for casual players!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Bubble Pop Frenzy
games.description: Bubble Pop Frenzy is a fast-paced arcade game where you pop bubbles to score points while avoiding dangerous bomble traps. The game speeds up the longer you play, testing your reflexes and focus. With retro-inspired visuals, smooth controls, and a catchy synthwave soundtrack, its easy to pick up and hard to put down. Try to beat your high score and survive the frenzy!
games.instructions: Click or tap on bubbles to pop them Avoid clicking on the bomble That rsquo s all you need to know mdash fast reactions are key

games.name: Mickey Run Adventure Game
games.description: Welcome to the great kingdom craft! prepare yourself brave mickey, get ready to run, jump, dash and rush through the kingdom. In this craft game, you will be a runner who has to run and collect coins in an endless runner game mine. You need to be very careful as there will be many mouse in your way. You will need to use your craft Mickey and reflexes to avoid them and keep running. There will also be power-ups that you can collect to help you in the craft game.
games.instructions: Up Arrow - Jump Left Arrow - Move Left Right Arrow - Move Right Down Arrow - Slide

games.name: Roblox In Barbie Style
games.description: Barbie meets the world of Roblox in this fun fashion game that lets you mix high-style outfits with blocky avatars. In Roblox in Barbie Style, your job is to style your Roblox character in pinks, sparkles, heels, and iconic Barbie-inspired outfits that pop.

games.description: Enjoy chaos, laughter, and action in Run Guys: Knockout Royale. A running and multiplayer royale game. In seesaw mode, run over one seesaw after another, keep balance and rush to the finish line. Racing at breakneck speeds through spinning wooden columns, trap floors and trap obstacles. Each level will knock out the slowest players. In mountain climbing, be the first to reach the summit and jump onto the crown.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Construction Simulator
games.description: Ready to build big and drive even bigger. Construction Simulator brings you into the most realistic world of construction driving simulation. Designed for boys who love mechanics, speed and challenges.

games.description: Tonight&amp;rsquo;s a big night&amp;mdash;Cappuccina and Tung Tung Sahur are heading out on their very first date, and they want to look perfect. In Ballerina Cappuccina First Date, you&amp;rsquo;re the stylist behind their special evening. From choosing outfits to adding finishing touches, it&amp;rsquo;s up to you to make sure both of them shine.

games.name: HexaPuzzleNew
games.description: Drag the blocks and place them in the container above to assemble them. Its very fun and has multiple exquisite levels. Come and experience it now.

games.name: Geometry Jump Dash
games.description: Jump, dash, and fly through a pulse-pounding obstacle course where one wrong move means disaster! This fast-paced, high-energy arcade game challenges players of all skill levels with precision platforming, rhythmic obstacles, and adrenaline-fueled gameplay.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Anime Couple: Avatar Maker
games.description: Anime Couple: Avatar Maker, the ultimate anime avatar character creation experience! Dive into the world of anime with our cutting-edge app that lets you design anime avatar faces, dress up girl avatars, and create the coolest anime couple characters youve ever seen.
games.instructions: Whether youre into cute and sweet anime couples or edgy and mysterious ones Anime Couple Avatar Maker has you covered With our comprehensive selection of features and customization options youll never run out of possibilities
